name: Passion Toadstool
description:
Great grandmother of Peach,
First of the Toadstool dynasty

(Super Mario's Prologue)

...

.History.
Before the woman, before the marriage to a prince from the world of men, there was a toadette—Passion Toadstool. Once a lowly court cook, she rose to her throne amidst the chaos that shattered the Koopa Empire into warring realms, crowning herself queen of a newborn Mushroom Kingdom.

Like herself, the early Mushroom Kingdom was composed of ruthless, imperialist toads—small, quick, armed only with spears and halberds—who followed Toadstool’s brilliance into conquest. And, as fast as the empire fell, many of the new worlds crumbled beneath their march.
...

War room of Mushroom Kingdom's highest generals, circa 101 AK (After Koopa)
...

Yoshi tribes reduced into mountable beasts, Goomba folk scattered from their ancestral lands, even the great Sarasaland trembled on their brink of annihilation—spared only by the daring diplomacy her own sister, Duchess Daisy I, whose charm stayed the Toad queen’s hand.

Passion Toadstool’s meteoric rise spread shockwaves across the stars. To the heirs of the fallen empire, the self-styled Koopa Kingdom, she was not a ruler—she was a threat, a conqueror that would soon knock on their very own gates. While the Koopas sought to reunite the galaxy under their banner of peace, all knew their truest mission;

Quell the 'Golden Queen' of Mushroom Kingdom.
